title: reSeed (Seed Scroller)
description: Quickly create new worlds with unique seeds.
body:
- Plugin allows you to quickly generate worlds with different seed on the server
- Suitable for finding a beautiful seed for your server

**Getting help:**
- Help is available on discord server - [https://discord.gg/AgD8z24zeK](https://discord.gg/AgD8z24zeK)

**Warnings:**
- The plugin has been tested only on 1.21, but in idea works on versions from 1.16-1.21
- Hosting requires a powerful processor and at least 4gb of RAM

**Dependencies:**
1. MultiWorld - [https://modrinth.com/plugin/multiworld-bukkit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/multiworld-bukkit)
2. FacilisCommon - [https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/faciliscommon-bukkit.107198/](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/faciliscommon-bukkit.107198/)
